overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a crowded cyberpunk nightclub. The scene features intense cyan and red neon lighting, industrial metal architecture with exposed trusses, and numerous NPCs dancing. The camera moves steadily through the club from the main dance floor with a geometric lattice backdrop toward the back bar area with red neon stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk nightclub main dance floor with geometric lattice backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded dance floor toward the center of the nightclub, passing dancers near the illuminated platform

notable_agents.action: female dancer with hair buns dancing energetically in the foreground

entered.detail: large illuminated geometric metal structure forming the back wall of the dance floor with bright white backlighting
raised circular platform with bright cyan neon edge lighting and dark center
cyan neon light strips running along the floor edges and corners
exposed industrial metal support beams with red accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The player moves through the main dance floor of a cyberpunk nightclub, passing dancers near a circular neon-lit platform. A massive geometric lattice wall dominates the background, illuminated with white light, while industrial metal trusses frame the left side and cyan neon strips line the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub bar area with holographic displays

events.description: moving from the open dance floor into the bar area with bottle displays and counter seating

agents.ego_description: navigating through the crowd toward the bar counter on the right side, passing between dancing NPCs

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter with various bottles visible on shelves

entered.detail: long bar counter with bottle displays and cyan neon underlighting along the base
illuminated advertisement poster featuring a woman's face on the wall behind the bar
staircase with bright red neon edge lighting leading to an upper level or back area

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the central dance area into the bar section, where a long counter with bottle displays and cyan neon trim becomes prominent on the right. Red neon stairs appear in the background, and the geometric lattice wall fades from view behind as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub rear lounge with red neon staircase

events.description: ambient lighting shifts to emphasize red neon tones as the camera approaches the back stairs

agents.ego_description: walking toward the back of the club near the red illuminated stairs, passing patrons at the bar

notable_agents.action: female patron leaning against the bar counter with a drink

entered.detail: double doors with red neon framing and green exit signage above
multiple illuminated display screens showing abstract patterns on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the rear of the nightclub where red neon stairs dominate the center view. The back bar area is visible to the right with patrons, and illuminated exit doors glow at the far end. The lighting shifts to emphasize warmer red tones compared to the earlier cyan-dominated areas, with holographic screens visible on the left wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched nightclub that shifts from a cyan-lit dance floor to a red-toned bar area. It begins by gliding through the main dance floor past dancers and a circular neon platform, with a massive white geometric lattice wall and industrial metal trusses framing the view. As the camera advances, the lattice wall fades into the background and the scene opens into the bar section, where a long counter with cyan neon trim and bottle displays emerges on the right. The perspective then shifts toward the rear of the club, where the lighting transitions from cool cyan to warm red tones. Finally, the camera approaches a set of dominant red neon stairs and holographic screens, ending with a view of the back bar patrons and glowing exit doors in the distance.
